description.overview: The 'Little Lion Dog' gets its name from its traditional lion-like trim. Once one of the rarest breeds, they're now prized for their cheerful, friendly nature.
description.temperament: Known for being playful, friendly, active.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, wavy, soft coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The 'Little Lion Dog' gets its name from its traditional lion-like trim. Once one of the rarest breeds, they're now prized for their cheerful, friendly nature.
